title: High-Performance Matching Engine
description: C++20 matching engine with a lock-free MPSC ring buffer achieving 3M+ msgs/sec. Price-time priority book with O(log P) lookup and O(1) in-level FIFO operations.

title: Japanese OCR
description: CNN with hand-coded backpropagation achieving 0.95 F1 on Kuzushiji-MNIST, outperforming ResNet-18. Custom Hessian update rule for 3x faster convergence.

title: WhiteBox Platform
description: Co-founded whitebox.ac, a technical interview prep platform with implementation-heavy systems problems, domain knowledge quizzes, and gacha cosmetics.

title: Distributed Observability System
description: Built at Expedia Group: handled 10M+ events/day across 50+ microservices, reduced MTTR from 2hrs to 1hr with custom Micrometer metrics and K8s monitoring.

title: SOX Compliance Automation
description: Python CLI and CI gate automating federal SOX compliance for 50k+ Datadog monitors. Reduced audit labor by 40+ hours per cycle.

title: LeetCode Problem/Editorial Authoring
description: Writing official contest questions and editorials for 1M+ DAU covering DP, advanced graphs, and game theory.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Personal portfolio built with HTML, CSS Grid, Flexbox, subgrid, and vanilla JS. Features dark mode, auto-nav generation, and localStorage persistence.

title: Heart Disease Prediction
description: Group ML project using Bayesian Networks and HMMs for heart disease prediction. Built with Python and scikit-learn.

title: osu! Automation Tools
description: Python automation tools for osu! relax mod and autopilot using Quartz on macOS for input simulation.

title: Spring Boot Modernization
description: Modernized legacy Spring Boot observability service from Java 11 to Java 21 at Expedia, resolving 100+ dependency breaks and improving startup by ~30%.

title: Data Visualization Project
description: DSC 106 data visualization project exploring interactive charting with D3.js and SVG.

title: Roblox Game Prototype
description: Roblox development with Luau scripting, Rojo toolchain, procedural terrain generation, and weapon tool systems.
